briefdescription.para: Checks whether or not a specified video timing mode is the preferred timing of the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID).

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to check the timing against.
is the video timing mode to check for support.

simplesect.para:
Status code.
XST_SUCCESS if the video timing mode is the preferred timing as specified in the base EDID.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.
None.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether or not a specified video timing mode is supported in the established timings field of the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID).

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to check the timing against.
is the video timing mode to check for support.

simplesect.para:
Status code.
XST_SUCCESS if the video timing mode is supported in the base EDID's established timings field.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.
None.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether or not a specified video timing mode is supported in the standard timings field of the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID).

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to check the timing against.
is the video timing mode to check for support.

simplesect.para:
Status code.
XST_SUCCESS if the video timing mode is supported in the base EDID's standard timings fields.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.
None.

parameterdescription.para: is b in the power operation, b^n.
is n in the power operation, b^n.

simplesect.para: Base^Power (Base to the power of Power).
None.

briefdescription.para: Convert a fractional binary number into a fixed point Q0.DecPtIndex number Binary digits to the right of the decimal point represent 2^-1 to 2^-(DecPtIndex+1).

detaileddescription.para: Binary digits to the left of the decimal point represent 2^0, 2^1, etc. For a given Q format, using an unsigned integer container with n fractional bits: its range is [0, 2^-n] its resolution is 2^n

parameterdescription.para: is the binary representation of the fraction.

is the index of the decimal point in the binary number. The decimal point is between the binary digits at Val's indices (DecPtIndex -1) and (DecPtIndex). DecPtIndex will determine the Q format resolution.

simplesect.para: Fixed point representation of the fractional part of the binary number in Q format.
None.

briefdescription.para: Get the manufacturer name as specified in the vendor and product ID field of the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID).

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve the manufacturer name from.
is the string that will be modified to hold the retrieved manufacturer name.

simplesect.para: The ManName argument is modified with the manufacturer name.

briefdescription.para: Get the color bit depth (bits per primary color) as specified in the basic display parameters and features, video input definition field of the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID).

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve color depth information from.

simplesect.para: The number of bits per primary color as specified by the supplied base EDID.
None.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the x chromaticity coordinate for red by converting a 10 bit binary fraction representation from the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID) to a integer in Q0.10 Format.

detaileddescription.para: To convert back to float divide the fixed point value by 2^10.

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve chromaticity information from.

simplesect.para: The x chromatacity coordinate for red.
All values will be accurate to +/-0.0005.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the y chromaticity coordinate for red by converting a 10 bit binary fraction representation from the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID) to a integer in Q0.10 Format.

detaileddescription.para: To convert back to float divide the fixed point value by 2^10.

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve chromaticity information from.

simplesect.para: The y chromatacity coordinate for red.
All values will be accurate to +/-0.0005.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the x chromaticity coordinate for green by converting a 10 bit binary fraction representation from the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID) to a integer in Q0.10 Format.

detaileddescription.para: To convert back to float divide the fixed point value by 2^10.

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve chromaticity information from.

simplesect.para: The x chromatacity coordinate for green.
All values will be accurate to +/-0.0005.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the y chromaticity coordinate for green by converting a 10 bit binary fraction representation from the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID) to a integer in Q0.10 Format.

detaileddescription.para: To convert back to float divide the fixed point value by 2^10.

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve chromaticity information from.

simplesect.para: The y chromatacity coordinate for green.
All values will be accurate to +/-0.0005.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the x chromaticity coordinate for blue by converting a 10 bit binary fraction representation from the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID) to a integer in Q0.10 Format.

detaileddescription.para: To convert back to float divide the fixed point value by 2^10.

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve chromaticity information from.

simplesect.para: The x chromatacity coordinate for blue.
All values will be accurate to +/-0.0005.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the y chromaticity coordinate for blue by converting a 10 bit binary fraction representation from the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID) to a integer in Q0.10 Format.

detaileddescription.para: To convert back to float divide the fixed point value by 2^10.

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve chromaticity information from.

simplesect.para: The y chromatacity coordinate for blue.
All values will be accurate to +/-0.0005.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the x chromaticity coordinate for white by converting a 10 bit binary fraction representation from the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID) to a integer in Q0.10 Format.

detaileddescription.para: To convert back to float divide the fixed point value by 2^10.

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve chromaticity information from.

simplesect.para: The x chromatacity coordinate for white.
All values will be accurate to +/-0.0005.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the y chromaticity coordinate for white by converting a 10 bit binary fraction representation from the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID) to an integer in Q0.10 Format.

detaileddescription.para: To convert back to float divide the fixed point value by 2^10.

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve chromaticity information from.

simplesect.para: The y chromatacity coordinate for white.
All values will be accurate to +/-0.0005.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the active vertical resolution from the standard timings field of the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID).

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to check the timing against.
specifies which one of the standard timings to retrieve from the standard timings field.

simplesect.para: The vertical active resolution of the specified standard timing from the supplied base EDID.
StdTimingsNum is an index 1-8.

briefdescription.para: Checks whether or not a specified video timing mode is supported as specified in the supplied base Extended Display Identification Data (EDID).

detaileddescription.para: The preferred timing, established timings (I, II, II), and the standard timings fields are checked for support.

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to check the timing against.
is the video timing mode to check for support.

simplesect.para:
Status code.
XST_SUCCESS if the video timing mode is supported as specified in the supplied base EDID.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.
None.
